---
title: "Most streamed Christmas songs"
date: 2024-12-08
categories: [Data is everywhere]
image: images/top_10_spotify_2024_1-5.png
description: "Top 10 most streamed Christmas songs on Spotify"
---

![](images/top_10_spotify_2024_1-5.png){.lightbox width="50%"}
![](images/top_10_spotify_2024_6-10.png){.lightbox width="50%"}


## About

Top 10 most streamed Christmas songs on Spotify (in billions of streams)
Graphics made in canva


**Data source:** Spotify
